modules.title: What SQL Is
modules.description: Introduction to SQL, its history, and its role in data management.

sections.title: Introduction to SQL
sections.description: Overview of SQL and its uses.

topics.title: What is SQL?
topics.summary: Definition and purpose of SQL.
learningGoals: Understand the meaning of SQL
Recognize the importance of SQL in databases

topics.title: History of SQL
topics.summary: A brief history of SQL and its evolution.
learningGoals: Recall key milestones in SQL development

topics.title: Databases and SQL
topics.summary: How SQL interacts with databases.
learningGoals: Identify the relationship between SQL and databases

topics.title: Common SQL Uses
topics.summary: Where and why SQL is used today.
learningGoals: List common applications of SQL

modules.title: Reading Data
modules.description: Learn to retrieve data from tables using SELECT statements.

topics.title: SELECT Statement Syntax
topics.summary: Structure of a basic SELECT statement.
learningGoals: Write a simple SELECT statement

topics.title: Selecting Columns
topics.summary: How to choose specific columns to display.
learningGoals: Select specific columns from a table

topics.title: Selecting All Columns
topics.summary: Using * to select all columns.
learningGoals: Use * to retrieve all columns

topics.title: Selecting from Multiple Tables (Intro)
topics.summary: Introduction to reading data from more than one table.
learningGoals: Understand the basics of multi-table queries

modules.title: Filtering
modules.description: Learn to filter results using WHERE clauses and logical operators.

topics.title: WHERE Clause Syntax
topics.summary: How to use WHERE to filter results.
learningGoals: Write a WHERE clause to filter data

topics.title: Comparison Operators
topics.summary: Using =, <, >, <=, >=, <> in filters.
learningGoals: Use comparison operators in WHERE clauses

topics.title: Logical Operators
topics.summary: Combining conditions with AND, OR, NOT.
learningGoals: Combine multiple conditions using logical operators

topics.title: Filtering NULL Values
topics.summary: Handling NULLs in filters.
learningGoals: Filter data where values are NULL or not NULL

modules.title: Sorting and Output Control
modules.description: Learn to sort results and limit the number of rows returned.

sections.title: Sorting and Limiting
sections.description: Control the order and amount of output.

topics.title: ORDER BY Clause
topics.summary: Sorting results by one or more columns.
learningGoals: Sort query results using ORDER BY

topics.title: Sorting ASC and DESC
topics.summary: Sorting in ascending and descending order.
learningGoals: Sort results in ascending or descending order

topics.title: LIMIT Clause
topics.summary: Restricting the number of rows returned.
learningGoals: Limit the number of rows in query results

topics.title: OFFSET Clause
topics.summary: Skipping rows in output.
learningGoals: Use OFFSET to skip rows in results

modules.title: Text Matching and Cleanup
modules.description: Work with text data using pattern matching and basic string functions.

topics.title: LIKE Operator
topics.summary: Pattern matching with LIKE and wildcards.
learningGoals: Use LIKE to match text patterns

topics.title: ILIKE and Case Insensitivity
topics.summary: Case-insensitive text matching.
learningGoals: Apply ILIKE for case-insensitive searches

topics.title: Basic String Functions
topics.summary: Using functions like UPPER, LOWER, TRIM.
learningGoals: Clean and transform text with string functions

topics.title: Handling Whitespace
topics.summary: Removing or managing extra spaces in text.
learningGoals: Remove or manage whitespace in text columns

modules.title: Aggregating Data
modules.description: Learn to summarize data using aggregate functions and grouping.

topics.title: COUNT, SUM, AVG
topics.summary: Counting and calculating averages and sums.
learningGoals: Use COUNT, SUM, and AVG to summarize data

topics.title: MIN and MAX
topics.summary: Finding minimum and maximum values.
learningGoals: Find minimum and maximum values in a column

topics.title: GROUP BY Clause
topics.summary: Grouping data for aggregation.
learningGoals: Group data using GROUP BY

topics.title: HAVING Clause
topics.summary: Filtering groups after aggregation.
learningGoals: Filter grouped data using HAVING

modules.title: Joining Tables
modules.description: Combine data from multiple tables using JOIN operations.

topics.title: INNER JOIN
topics.summary: Combining rows with matching values.
learningGoals: Use INNER JOIN to combine tables

topics.title: LEFT JOIN
topics.summary: Including all rows from the left table.
learningGoals: Use LEFT JOIN to include unmatched rows

topics.title: RIGHT JOIN
topics.summary: Including all rows from the right table.
learningGoals: Use RIGHT JOIN to include unmatched rows

topics.title: FULL OUTER JOIN
topics.summary: Combining all rows from both tables.
learningGoals: Use FULL OUTER JOIN to combine all rows

modules.title: Practical SQL Projects
modules.description: Apply SQL skills in hands-on projects and review key concepts.

topics.title: Mini Project: Data Exploration
topics.summary: Explore and analyze a sample database.
learningGoals: Apply SELECT, WHERE, and ORDER BY in a real scenario

topics.title: Mini Project: Data Cleanup
topics.summary: Clean and transform messy data.
learningGoals: Use string functions and filters to clean data

topics.title: Review Quiz
topics.summary: Test knowledge of key concepts from the course.
learningGoals: Reinforce understanding of core SQL topics

topics.title: Next Steps in SQL
topics.summary: Guidance for further learning and practice.
learningGoals: Identify resources for continued SQL learning
